title: eleocharis pusilla
intro: Eleocharis pusilla, also known as dwarf spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eleocharis pusilla include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and help to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
